description_long: This guard rail consists of five parallel horizontal bars, evenly spaced and supported by two vertical posts at each end. The structure is constructed from what appears to be black-coated metal tubing, giving it a sleek and industrial appearance. The ends of the horizontal rails are cleanly terminated at the posts, with no visible flaring or additional end treatments. The overall design is minimalistic, with no decorative elements or reflective markings present. The railings are likely hollow, reducing weight while maintaining strength, and the finish is smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a protective coating. This type of guard rail is commonly used in urban environments to delineate pedestrian areas, protect from vehicular intrusion, or guide foot traffic.
description: A sleek, black metal guard rail with five horizontal bars and two vertical posts, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal bars and both vertical posts, clearly displaying the full width and structure.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the end of the posts and a thin edge of the bars visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing all five horizontal bars and both vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile with minimal visible detail except the post ends.
